overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a dystopian urban street with burning abandoned vehicles, transitioning to the entrance of Rancho Coronado Public Park. The scene features neon-lit buildings, digital billboards, and a dark, atmospheric cyberpunk aesthetic.

agents.ego_description: walking down a dark city street at night, approaching abandoned burning vehicles and debris

tall residential buildings with fire escapes on the right side
large illuminated advertising screen displaying colorful graphics at the end of the street
abandoned vehicle engulfed in flames with smoke rising
tall street light illuminating the road ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark, narrow city street at night. The camera moves forward between tall apartment buildings, approaching a line of burning abandoned vehicles on the left. A digital billboard glows in the distance, and debris litters the asphalt road.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with line of burning abandoned cars

events.description: camera moves closer to the burning cars, passing them on the left side
passing the last burning car, fire and smoke begin to recede from view

agents.ego_description: walking alongside the burning vehicles, observing the flames and smoke on the left

entered.detail: second abandoned vehicle on fire with open doors
third burning car further down the line
papers and trash scattered across the road surface

segments.scene_description: The camera moves alongside a line of burning abandoned cars on the left, with flames illuminating the dark street. Debris is scattered across the asphalt. The heat and smoke from the vehicles are prominent as the camera passes each burning car in sequence.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark urban street transitioning to park approach

events.description: leaving the burning car area behind, entering a darker section of the street
street becomes significantly darker as artificial lighting diminishes

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street past the abandoned vehicles, heading toward a darker area ahead

entered.detail: dark opening or alleyway at the end of the street

segments.scene_description: Having passed the burning vehicles, the camera continues down an increasingly dark street. The firelight fades, leaving only sparse street lamps to illuminate the path. The buildings feel more enclosed as the camera approaches a darker section of the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: Rancho Coronado Public Park entrance with illuminated signage

events.description: arriving at the illuminated Rancho Coronado Public Park entrance sign
camera turns left to pass the park sign and enter the park area

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the public park, passing the large illuminated entrance sign

entered.detail: large illuminated entrance sign reading 'RANCHO CORONADO PUBLIC PARK' in white neon letters
tall palm trees visible inside the park entrance
tall futuristic towers with purple and blue neon lighting in the background
dirt path leading into the park area

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to the entrance of Rancho Coronado Public Park, marked by a large illuminated sign. The camera moves past the sign into a park area with palm trees and dirt paths, with neon-lit towers visible in the background against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, dystopian city street that gradually transitions into the neon-lit entrance of a public park. It begins by moving forward between towering apartment buildings toward a line of burning abandoned vehicles, with a distant digital billboard casting a glow over the debris-strewn asphalt. As the camera passes alongside the sequence of flaming cars, the intense heat and smoke illuminate the narrow road before the firelight fades into a deeper, more enclosed darkness. The scene then shifts as the camera emerges from the shadows to reach the illuminated sign of Rancho Coronado Public Park. Finally, the view opens up into a park area featuring dirt paths and palm trees, with glowing neon towers looming in the background against the night sky.
